title: AMA: I built the world’s first free publicly available trading agent
author: TheReaIIronMan
selftext:
It’s probably more accurate to call it a trading strategy agent.

This AI can ominously perform the process of doing financial research, creating profitable trading strategies. This article outlines my journey as a biology student who couldn’t code to creating the world’s first publicly available AI trading agents.

AMA!

replies.author: TheReaIIronMan
replies.body: Ahhh I did text to speech and I meant to say autonomously 🤣

replies.author: TheReaIIronMan
replies.body: Every claim I’ve made in the article is verifiable. Which claim don’t you believe?

comments.author: logged_just2_upvote
comments.body: Hey man! Loved the article. I think you'll run into a lot of skepticism since so many grifters exist in this space. That said, I legit have started to learn python for the very tool you've built. I will check it out and message any feedback. It's cool to see people share the same thought with AI and trading and try to make it work.
